facaulty.name: (Dr.)Mekafiye Phillips
facaulty.bio: A Graduate of Marketing with a Postgraduate Diploma in Management and an MSc in Hospitality and Event Management, received an Honorary Doctorate Fellow award from the Chartered Institute of Hospitality, Tourism and Management of America (DFCIHTMA). She is the co-convener of the Night of Praise and Declaration (NOPAD) and CEO of the Jesus Jireh Rapha Support Foundation (JJRSF), a non-governmental organization, which meets the needs of people and supports ministers and ministries that preach the gospel of grace.
additionalInfo: She believes that love conquers all and so earnestly desires that all men see Jesus. Alongside her husband, she began writing and documenting their life experiences and has co-authored 12 books as at July of 2024.
Embarking on the entrepreneurial journey, she became the Group Managing Director of Turich Multi Ventures, which deals in groceries and accessories.
Mekafiye Foluke is a Pastor with Savannah Ministries and is blessed with 2 lovely daughters, Phoebe Anuoluwa and Tirzah Iyanuoluwa.
